title: chat_capability and chat_push_capability duplicate two-step lookup pattern
description: jmap.rs Session: chat_capability() and chat_push_capability() share an identical two-step match pattern — first look up the account by id, then look up the capability key within account_capabilities, then serde_json::from_value(...).map(Some).map_err(...). The only differences are the capability URI string and the return type T. Adding a third account-level capability will require copying the pattern again. Suggested rewrite: add a private helper fn account_capability<T: DeserializeOwned>(&self, account_id: &str, cap_key: &str, label: &str) -> Result<Option<T>, ClientError> that encodes the lookup once, then each public method becomes a one-liner calling that helper with the appropriate key and label string.
close_reason: Opinion: capability lookup helper per SEC7
